name: persistent
description: Block Esc and backdrop-click close paths. The explicit close button (or consumer action) is the only way out.

name: size
description: Preset width. `'fullscreen'` stretches to the viewport.

name: align
description: Vertical alignment. `'top'` pins the dialog 6vh from the top.

name: color
description: Accent palette — drives focus outline and selection tint.

name: header
description: Sticky header strip. Provides the accessible name via `aria-labelledby`.

name: footer
description: Sticky footer strip — typical place for action buttons.

name: onclose
description: Fires when the dialog closes (any reason).
